---
title: "Category SPC"
description: "Serial position by category"
---

::: {.callout-note}
See [templates/cat_spc.ipynb](../../templates/cat_spc.ipynb) for a complete example.
:::

## Overview

**Category SPC** shows serial position curves broken down by item category.

## Usage

```python
from jaxcmr.analyses.cat_spc import plot_cat_spc

plot_cat_spc(
    datasets=[data],
    category_field="condition",
    category_values=[1, 2],
    labels=["Category A", "Category B"],
)
```
